texto: The man saw no adventure, no challenge, no conquest, no sweat, and no sense of accomplishment in what we were about to do – only stupidity. There was no way to explain to him our need to explore, to find out about the rest of the world, and to discover and develop ingenuity, endurance, and self-reliance – that pioneer spirit that had been buried under the comforts of modern society.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Barbara Savage sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “The man saw no adventure, no challenge, no conquest, no sweat, and no sense of accomplishment in …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, adventure, about, útil em momentos de termino e reflexao.
